## etude replay

Replay a recorded stage or entire run

```
etude replay <run> [<stage>] [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --harness string           override harness name in recorded producer
      --harness-version string   override harness version in recorded producer
  -h, --help                     help for replay
      --model string             override model in recorded producer
      --output string            write output to this file instead of stdout
      --record                   persist the replay output as a new linked run
      --runner string            runner command spec (e.g. ./run.sh)
      --skill-id string          override skill id in recorded producer
      --skill-repo string        override skill repo in recorded producer
      --skill-version string     override skill version in recorded producer
      --timeout duration         per-invocation timeout for the runner (0 disables) (default 10m0s)
```
